description.ko: 주변 음파를 복잡한 빛의 패턴과 물리적 진동으로 변환하여 청각과 시각의 영역을 잇는 가시적인 다리를 만드는 최첨단 키네틱 조각입니다.
description.en: A cutting-edge kinetic sculpture that translates ambient sound waves into complex light patterns and physical vibrations, creating a tangible bridge between the auditory and visual realms.

prompt: A futuristic, sleek metallic orb known as ECHO-0 suspended in a dark laboratory. Vibrant neon lines of cyan and magenta radiate from its core, visualizing sound waves as 3D holographic geometric shapes. Hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave aesthetic, intricate mechanical details.
